---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to repository, architecture, or package documentation.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Documentation Area

Which document, page, or concept needs improvement?

## Current Gap

What is unclear, missing, inaccurate, or difficult to follow?

## Suggested Improvement

Describe the change that would make the documentation more useful.

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, or related links if they help explain the request.
